items.title: Product Engineer
items.summary: Improving Bot0 onboarding, connections, and reliability with the Bytespace team.
details: Shipped 8 Bot0 improvements in under a month.
Fixed connection issues that made setup less fragile.
Improved reliability for teams using Bot0 day to day.

items.title: Head of Product & Engineering
items.summary: Building the public site and member systems for Sip & Scale, a founder community across 20+ cities.
details: Built a site ranking #1 for branded search queries and driving 600 unique page views.
Built tools that help the team run partnerships, events, and community work.

items.title: Software Engineer Intern
items.summary: Shipped dashboard and web improvements for Filipino small businesses using NextPay.
details: Built and launched a production marketing site to accelerate acquisition experiments with the marketing team.
With 5+ engineers, shipped dashboard updates that cut manual processing time by 75%.
Built reusable front-end pieces for the product team.

items.title: AVP for IT Skills & Development
items.summary: Led developer workshops and built faster event check-in tools for MISA.
details: Led a 4-part web development workshop series for 20+ student developers.
Built an internal registration system that cut event check-in time by 75% across MISA events.
Helped run technical trainings and student-built projects.

items.title: Head of HR
items.summary: Owned recruitment, onboarding, and member formation for the organization.
details: Drove member formation programs and internal initiatives.
Ran recruitment and onboarding for new members.
Organized events for growth and team cohesion.

items.title: Founder
items.summary: Started and piloted a phone-based matching game for student events.
details: Coordinated a 10-person team across product, design, and engineering.
Ran 4 pilot events and supported 80+ users.
Led product direction, development, and outreach.

items.title: Externals Core Team
items.summary: Managed communications and follow-ups for Seniors' Send-Off.
details: Drafted and sent email updates to seniors and alumni for Seniors' Send-Off X LoopBack 2025.
Managed follow-ups so the event team could prepare on time.

items.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
Frontend Developer
items.summary: Built pages and interfaces for CompSAt projects.
details: Implemented pages for CompSAt projects.
Worked with fellow developers to make the projects easier to use.

items.title: Logistics Core Team | Blue Hacks 2025
items.summary: Helped run logistics for Blue Hacks 2025.
details: Handled venue reservations, layout setup, food coordination, and event materials.
Coordinated deliveries and setup for event day.
Worked with the logistics team through planning and event day.

items.title: Web Developer
items.summary: Led a 3-person team building the TEDx event website.
details: Led a team of 3 developers to design and build the TEDxAteneoDeManila 2025 website.
Matched the site layout and navigation to the event theme and TEDx brand standards.
Made the site work across desktop and mobile.
